label: Poison — lowers health by 1 every 6 seconds
Rust — lowers defense by 1 every 6 seconds
Fire — adjacent enemies lose 1 HP every 6 seconds
Sick — adds 1 second to an enemy timer every 6 seconds
Vamp — steals 1 HP from an enemy every 6 seconds and heals a needy ally
Stumble — adds 1 second to an enemy timer every 6 seconds
Dazed — 20% chance a solo attack hits an ally instead
